{"description":"Explore workspace structure","prompt":"Explore the workspace at /home/user/workspace. I need to understand:
1. What kind of project this is (Next.js, Remix, etc.)
2. What files already exist
3. Any existing patterns for pages, layouts, server actions, caching
4. Package.json dependencies
5. Any existing admin pages or catalog-related code

Be very thorough - check the root, any src/app directories, look for existing patterns.","subagent_type":"Explore"}

[{"type":"text","text":"I now have a complete picture of the workspace. Here is a thorough summary: --- ## Workspace Exploration Report ### 1. Project Type This is a **Next.js 16 (canary)** project using the **App Router**. Key indicators: - `next.config.ts` exists with a minimal Next.js config (empty `nextConfig` object). - `tsconfig.json` includes a `"plugins": [{"name": "next"}]` entry and the `"jsx": "react-jsx"` compiler option. - `package.json` has `next: "16.2.0-canary.41"`, `react: "19.1.0"`, and `react-dom: "19.1.0"`. - The project structure follows the App Router convention: `app/layout.tsx` (root layout) and `app/page.tsx` (home page) at the top level (no `src/` directory). - There is **no** `remix.config.js`, no `src/` directory, and no pages router. ### 2. Existing Files The project is very fresh -- only these source files exist outside `node_modules`: | File | Purpose | |---|---| | `/home/user/workspace/app/layout.tsx` | Root layout (basic HTML shell with metadata title/description) | | `/home/user/workspace/app/page.tsx` | Home page (renders `

Home

`) | | `/home/user/workspace/lib/db.js` | Mock database module with a single exported function: `getAllProducts()` | | `/home/user/workspace/next.config.ts` | Empty Next.js configuration | | `/home/user/workspace/package.json` | Dependencies and scripts | | `/home/user/workspace/tsconfig.json` | TypeScript configuration | | `/home/user/workspace/.gitignore` | Standard ignores | | `/home/user/workspace/package-lock.json` | Lock file | There is **no** `public/` directory, **no** `.env` files, **no** tests, `no` middleware, and **no** `next-env.d.ts` (generated at build time). ### 3. Existing Patterns for Pages, Layouts, Server Actions, Caching **Pages**: There is exactly one page (`/home/user/workspace/app/page.tsx`), which is a minimal async component exporting a simple JSX `

Home

`. It uses `export default function Page()` -- no async data fetching on the page yet. **Layouts**: There is exactly one layout (`/home/user/workspace/app/layout.tsx`) -- the root layout. It wraps children in `` and `` tags and exports `Metadata`. It is **not** itself part of any subdirectory hierarchy (no `(group)` route groups, no nested layouts). **Server actions**: None exist. There is no `"use server"` directive anywhere in the project. **Caching**: No caching patterns exist. No `cache()`, `unstable_cache()`, `revalidatePath()`, `revalidateTag()`, or `generateStaticParams()` calls are present. **Route handlers**: No `route.ts` files exist. **Loading/Error/Not-found states**: No `loading.tsx`, `error.tsx`, `not-found.tsx`, or `template.tsx` files exist. ### 4. Package.json Dependencies ```json { "private": true, "type": "module", "scripts": { "dev": "next dev", "build": "next build", "start": "next start" }, "dependencies": { "@ai-sdk/react": "2.0.0-beta.28", "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk": "^1.17.0", "ai": "5.0.59", "next": "16.2.0-canary.41", "react": "19.1.0", "react-dom": "19.1.0", "zod": "^4.0.10" }, "devDependencies": { "@types/node": "^20", "@types/react": "^19", "@types/react-dom": "^19", "typescript": "^5", "vitest": "^3.1.3", "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.4.1", "vite-tsconfig-paths": "^5.1.4" } } ``` Notable points: - **AI SDK stack**: `ai` (5.x), `@ai-sdk/react` (beta), `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk` -- suggests this project is intended to use AI/LLM features. - **Zod**: `zod` v4 for schema validation. - **Vitest**: configured as the test runner (with `@vitejs/plugin-react` and `vite-tsconfig-paths`), but no tests have been written yet. - No UI library (Tailwind, shadcn, Material UI, etc.) is installed. ### 5. Existing Admin Pages or Catalog-Related Code **Admin pages**: None e…(+1258)

1	import { unstable_cache, revalidateTag } from "next/cache";
2	import { getAllProducts } from "@/lib/db";
3	import { SyncForm } from "./sync-form";
4	
5	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
6	// Cache product data with the "products" tag so every view that depends on
7	// the same catalog shares a single cached entry.  This keeps the admin
8	// experience snappy without re-querying the DB on every pageload.
9	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
10	const getCachedProducts = unstable_cache(
11	  async () => getAllProducts(),
12	  ["admin-products-list"],
13	  { tags: ["products"] },
14	);
